sections.paragraph:
verb סיגר

(Archaic) hand over, deliver (an enemy)

verb לסגור

to close, shut; close down; decide; besiege

verb להיסגר

be closed, shut

verb להסתגר

to shut oneself

verb להסגיר

to extradite, hand over, deliver, surrender

verb הוסגר

be extradited, handed over

masculine noun

lock, bolt, shutter; tongue (of lock) ; closure

masculine noun סגר (>>סיגר)

cigar
